margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.metric_of_record: acc_A(arm, cell) = episode-restricted K-way top-1 accuracy at the query answer position, each arm's own native LM-head route; K-restricted gather+argmax (_rung1_k_restricted_pred_slot); pinned EVAL_SEED set, n=4096 queries/cell; verdict-grade reads = n=3 seeds with paired delta_ci_n CIs (sec 1.8)
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.primary_axis1_cell: task1_calib_K32 (K/d=0.5) -- TASK1-PRIMARY (Rev 5.1 pin; supersedes sec 1.4.1's 'Task 2, primary')
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.demonstration_bar: acc_A > 3x(1/K) (>0.09375 at K=32); at/below = NO-RECALL; a difference between two NO-RECALL arms is never separation

axis1_tiers_delta_eq_accA_contender_minu.WIN: contender clears demonstration bar AND Delta >= 0.30 with paired-seed CI excluding 0.30
axis1_tiers_delta_eq_accA_contender_minu.LOSE: ablation clears demonstration bar AND -Delta >= 0.30 with CI excluding 0.30
axis1_tiers_delta_eq_accA_contender_minu.TIE: Delta CI entirely inside (-0.30, +0.30); ALSO TIE if NEITHER arm clears the demonstration bar (joint task-learning failure)
axis1_tiers_delta_eq_accA_contender_minu.INDETERMINATE: CI straddles +/-0.30 without excluding it -- TIE-adjacent, escalation-eligible, never a WIN

margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.margin_rationale: 0.30 ~= 9.6x chance at K=32, ~3x the demonstration bar, < 1/3 of round-3's realized single-seed gap (0.9543)
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.data_efficiency_operationalizations: threshold acc_A >= 0.90; tokens-to-threshold X=50% provisional; sustained CI-separation >= 3 consecutive logged checkpoints; ablation-never-clears => ratio reported as a BOUND, never extrapolated
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.axis2_Mstar: sec 1.4.2 machinery VERBATIM with per-M gap statistic re-registered to acc_A; 0.20 per-point margin; M in {1,2,4,8,16,32}; descending fixed-sequence walk; LOSE M*<=2 / TIE M*=4 / WIN M*>=8 / INDETERMINATE; degenerate-baseline handling (uncapped transformer below demonstration bar => 'baseline non-competitive', never M*=inf); joint-NO-RECALL M-cells scored TIE-equivalent, never LOSE, never set M*
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.task2_disposition: pre-registered joint-failure TIE (contender 0.0376 < 0.09375 bar on the frozen checkpoint); NOT retrained this round; separate post-sweep TASK2 DIAGNOSIS ROUND; disclosed verbatim in any claim mentioning task2
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.nichani_caveat: 'recall' = episode-restricted top-1 retrieval under argmax decoding; under argmax a rank-1 state can support ~d associations (Nichani, Lee & Bietti, ICLR 2025, arXiv:2412.06538) -- travels with every Leg-A number
margins_frozen_verbatim_sec_1_31_1.rf09_status: NOT a LOSE criterion, NOT a gate conjunct, NOT in any band -- Leg-B diagnostic only (sec 1.31.2)

The sec 1.30 raw anchor rf@0.9 is 0.0; the honest +/-0.05-on-rf@0.9 band (floored at 0, per the band's own floor clause) is [0, 0.05]; measured 0.0 REPRODUCES the anchor exactly (drift delta 0.000). Cross-checks: cos_mean measured vs anchor agree (per-cell JSON), ckpt md5 matches the sec 1.36 identity table, and the SAME code path reproduces the contender anchor within +/-0.001. Verdict: NO DRIFT -- stale-checkpoint/tap-wiring/loader hypotheses all excluded; the investigation sec 1.31.2 requires is complete. Recorded per the read-the-raw-artifact hard rule (CLAUDE.md).
